brief_justification: Answered Yes but correct answer is No, with flawed prediction of typical intuition; Goes beyond surface by analyzing causal chain and distinguishing causation from blame; No self-monitoring or questioning of own approach; No verification against psychological research on causation judgments; Hedging language present but no structured uncertainty; Mentions blame vs causation distinction but doesn't consider that people discount unintentional/helpful intermediate actors; Shows reasoning chain from neighbor's driving to accident but misapplies the causal attribution framework
